title: Deepfake-Audio-Detection-System
description: A deepfake audio detection system is a machine learning-based security tool designed to analyze audio recordings and distinguish between human-spoken voice and AI-synthesized or manipulated speech.
summary: 该内容介绍了一个基于机器学习的深度伪造音频检测系统，其核心功能是分析音频录音，区分人类语音与AI合成或篡改的语音。这是一种用于音频安全领域的技术工具。
